mapper.sql: id, source_type, owner_user_id, name, meal_time, mood, scene, health_goal, cuisine, taste, convenience, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meal_item ( source_type, owner_user_id, name, meal_time, mood, scene, health_goal, cuisine, taste, convenience, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{sourceType}, #{ownerUserId}, #{name}, #{mealTime}, #{mood}, #{scene}, #{healthGoal}, #{cuisine}, #{taste}, #{convenience}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE meal_item SET name = #{name}, meal_time = #{mealTime}, mood = #{mood}, scene = #{scene}, health_goal = #{healthGoal}, cuisine = #{cuisine}, taste = #{taste}, convenience = #{convenience}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND source_type = 'PERSONAL' AND owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM meal_item WHERE source_type = 'PERSONAL' AND owner_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM meal_item WHERE source_type = 'PUBLIC' AND owner_user_id IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM meal_item WHERE source_type = 'PERSONAL' AND owner_user_id = #{userId}
